# Case export-default - rspack: Step 2

## Changed Files
- file.module.css

## Asset Files
- Bundle: rspack-bundle.js
- Manifest: main.LAST_HASH.css.hot-update.json, size: 1674
- Manifest: main.LAST_HASH.hot-update.json, size: 28
- Update: main.LAST_HASH.hot-update.js, size: 1287

## Manifest

### main.LAST_HASH.css.hot-update.json

```json
{"content":"","deps":{"0":[]}}
```



### main.LAST_HASH.hot-update.json

```json
{"c":["main"],"r":[],"m":[]}
```


## Update


### main.LAST_HASH.hot-update.js

#### Changed Modules
- ./modules/export-default/file.module.css

#### Changed Runtime Modules
- webpack/runtime/get_full_hash

#### Changed Content
```js
"use strict";
exports.ids = ["main"];
exports.modules = {
"./modules/export-default/file.module.css"(module, __webpack_exports__, __webpack_require__) {
__webpack_require__.r(__webpack_exports__);
__webpack_require__.d(__webpack_exports__, {
  "default": () => (__rspack_default_export)
});
// extracted by mini-css-extract-plugin
/* export default */ const __rspack_default_export = ({"bar":"ceYtXbON1ZUaBizR"});
  if (true) {
    (function() {
      var localsJsonString = "{\"bar\":\"ceYtXbON1ZUaBizR\"}";
      var cssReload = __webpack_require__("../../runtime/hotModuleReplacement.cjs")(module.id, {}, "");
      // only invalidate when locals change
      if (
        module.hot.data &&
        module.hot.data.value &&
        module.hot.data.value !== localsJsonString
      ) {
        module.hot.invalidate();
      } else {
        module.hot.accept();
      }
      module.hot.dispose(function(data) {
        data.value = localsJsonString;
        cssReload();
      });
    })();
  }

},

};
exports.runtime = function(__webpack_require__) {
// lynx css hot update
(() => {

__webpack_require__.cssHotUpdateList = [["main","main.LAST_HASH.css.hot-update.json"]];

})();
// webpack/runtime/get_full_hash
(() => {
__webpack_require__.h = () => ("CURRENT_HASH")
})();

}
;
;
```




## Runtime
### Status

```txt
check => prepare => dispose => apply => idle
```



### JavaScript

#### Outdated

Outdated Modules:
- ./modules/export-default/file.module.css


Outdated Dependencies:
```json
{}
```

#### Updated

Updated Modules:
- ./modules/export-default/file.module.css

Updated Runtime:
- `__webpack_require__.cssHotUpdateList`
- `__webpack_require__.h`


#### Callback

Accepted Callback:


Disposed Callback:
- ./modules/export-default/file.module.css
